nodes.name: Schedule (Daily 14:00)
nodes.notes: Default: 14:00 Europe/Madrid, every day. Weekend guard is in the Code node. Timezone is set at workflow level.

nodes.name: Fetch & Format
nodes.notes: Fetches /internal/followup-automation, filters recently_contacted, formats Telegram message. SETUP: edit API_BASE and API_KEY constants at the top. Weekend guard skips Sat/Sun. Runtime: uses Node.js http module (n8n sandbox compatible).

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: 1) Select existing OpenClaw Telegram Bot credential (same as daily-ops-snapshot). 2) Replace CONFIGURE_ME with your Telegram chat ID.
